content.announcement: Fresh breakfast burritos made daily in Agoura Hills. Order online for pickup.

featuredIntro.title: The burritos people will open the site for.

reasons.title: Built like a neighborhood favorite, presented like a premium fast-casual brand.
reasons.body: Every highlight below reinforces appetite, trust, and speed so the site feels handcrafted without slowing down the order path.

items.title: Fresh ingredients, layered with intention
items.body: Cage-free eggs, premium proteins, bright salsas, and queso-driven richness create a strong first impression.

items.title: Fast pickup without boring food
items.body: The site prioritizes order buttons, visible prices, and clear menu browsing so the path to checkout stays short.

menu.title: The full spread, presented like a house menu board.
menu.body: Menu sections are powered from Menu Categories and Menu Items in WordPress.
menu.note: Desktop uses the richer menu board layout. Mobile uses stacked sections.
menu.categoryFocusBody: Browse one category at a time for a cleaner, more premium menu interaction without clutter.
menu.footerNote: Open live ordering for modifiers and full details.

about.title: A neighborhood breakfast burrito spot with enough craft to feel worth the detour.
paragraphs: Use this section to tell the brand story in two short paragraphs.
Keep the copy specific, local, and operationally credible.

proof.title: Trust cues that reassure people before they commit to breakfast.
proof.body: Testimonials are managed as their own content type so they can be reviewed independently.

items.title: Priya K.
items.body: I didn’t think a breakfast burrito could taste this good. Everything is fresh, perfectly seasoned, and wrapped just right. Frankie’s is my new go-to spot every weekend

items.title: Jason M
items.body: Frankie’s Breakfast Burrito completely changed my mornings. The flavors are insane, the portions are huge, and it actually keeps me full till lunch. I’m officially hooked!

items.title: mark specter
items.body: "The flavors are simple, pure, and balanced... the burrito is still light feeling and not greasy."

location.title: Easy to find. Easy to order. Easy to come back to.
location.name: Frankie's Breakfast Burritos
location.hours: Open daily from 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM
location.ordering: Pickup, delivery, catering, and gift cards all route through Toast.
location.mapBody: Responsive embed area with parking, pickup, and landmark context.
location.cateringText: Need breakfast for a crew? Catering packs feed up to 10 with 48 hours notice.

finalCta.title: Start with a signature burrito. Add the tots. Make the morning better.
finalCta.body: Use this final section to push directly into the live ordering flow.

footer.description: Breakfast burritos, frescas, and loaded sides served daily in Agoura Hills.
